## Summary

What changed and why?

## AI Role

- [ ] Claude architecture/planning
- [ ] Codex implementation
- [ ] Gemini research/review
- [ ] Human/manual change

## Verification

- [ ] Lint passed
- [ ] Tests passed
- [ ] Build passed
- [ ] Smoke check passed or not applicable

## High-Risk Area Check

- [ ] Auth/session impact reviewed
- [ ] Payment/webhook impact reviewed
- [ ] Supplier/booking impact reviewed
- [ ] Database migration is additive or rollback is documented
- [ ] No secrets, user data, payment data, or booking exports committed
